# Arcane Bait
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Arcane%20Bait&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Arcane Bait
| desc = The arcanic beings often lure in their prey with the help of the arcane power they posses.
| slot = trap
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| cost = 140
| damage = 80,140,180
| radius = 9,6,3
| triggerradius = 4.5,3,1.5
| armtime = 8,6,4
| cooldown = 0
| fameb = 8
| bonuses = {{Stat|vit|-2}}{{Stat|dex|2}}{{Stat|wis|2}}
| effects = yes
| cursed = (middle)2

| paralysed = (small)2
| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by 
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavTraps}}
</noinclude>
